item.title: Cardi B Is Still Welcome at 'SNL' After Alleged Nicki Minaj Outburst on Set
item.description: Cardi B’s alleged backstage meltdown over a Nicki Minaj gag may have shaken the walls at 'SNL' ... but we're told there's no hard feelings! Sources cl...

item.title: 'Below Deck's Captain Sandy Yawn Confronts Accused Scam Builder in Court, On Video

item.title: Katherine Short Changed Her Name to Katherine Hartley to Avoid Harassment

item.title: Mike White Shocks Fellow Castaways With Ripped Abs on 'Survivor 50' Premiere
item.description: Lookin' good, Mike White! "Survivor 50" boasts the largest cast of any season ... but Mike stood out right away, as competitors noticed his "bulging 6...
